name: hook contract: hook exceeding settings.json hooks.timeout_ms is killed and treated as block (exit 2)
command: echo '{"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"x.ts"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/sleep-forever.sh" & pid=$!; sleep 2; kill -0 $pid 2>/dev/null && kill $pid; wait $pid 2>/dev/null; echo ok 1>&2
